title: Crispy Roasted Rice Pilaf
description: An earthy and crispy German-inspired meal prep dish featuring rice vinegar for a tangy flavor profile, perfect for pescatarian diets.
instructions: Rinse the rice under cold water and drain well.
In a medium saucepan, combine rice with 2 cups of water. Bring to a boil then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 15 minutes or until water is absorbed.

While the rice cooks, in a large mixing bowl, mix chopped parsley, garlic cloves, salt, black pepper, rice vinegar, olive oil, and mixed herbs together. Squeeze half of the lemon juice over this mixture.
Once the rice is cooked, let it stand for 5 minutes before fluffing with a fork. Gently fold in the dressing from step 4 into the cooled rice.
Transfer the rice to an oven-safe baking dish. Evenly spread out the pilaf and bake for about 20-30 minutes or until golden brown on top and crispy around the edges.
Remove from oven, let it rest for a few minutes before serving.
